agent_text: `expect(wrapper.classes().length).toBe(1)` (and the equivalent `.toBe(2)` / `.toBe(3)` assertions in every other test) creates brittle tests: any future addition of a utility class anywhere will break every one of these tests, even tests that are logically unrelated to the change. A more resilient approach is `expect(wrapper.classes()).toEqual(['nav'])` for the single-class case, or dropping the length assertion entirely and relying only on `.toContain()` checks for the classes you care about.
